articles.title: The Absurdity of Autonomy
articles.summary: The modern world has given us kingly powers to claim and control. But the more we’ve achieved this magical touch, the more the world becomes dead to us. How we cope tells us who and what we trust.

articles.title: The Pope Just Issued The Most Significant Church Statement On Technology In History
articles.summary: On May 25, 2026, the Catholic Church did something it has never done before. Pope Leo XIV issued a full papal encyclical on artificial intelligence. Not a commission report.
